title: Tax Regulatory Process
summary: This is an administrative listing page cataloguing historical Memorandums of Agreement (MOAs) between Treasury and OMB regarding regulatory review processes under Executive Orders 12291 and 12866, along with a 2019 policy statement on tax regulatory process. The page contains links to documents dating from 1983 to 2025 but no current policy decisions, economic data, or market-relevant content.
key_points: Page lists MOAs from 1983, 1993, 2018, 2019, 2023, and 2025 between Treasury and OMB regarding regulatory review
MOAs address how OIRA reviews tax regulatory actions under Executive Orders 12291 and 12866
Page also contains a 2019 policy statement on tax regulatory process regarding notice-and-comment rulemaking
This is a directory/catalogue page, not an actual policy document or economic release
why_it_matters: This page has no relevance to market structure or macro catalysts. It is purely an administrative reference page listing historical inter-agency agreements on regulatory review procedures. No market-sensitive information is contained herein.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per metadata - CORE RULE #5 requires rejection of homepage, navigation, listing, or search pages
Source contains only catalogued references to historical MOA documents (1983-2025), not the documents themselves
No market structure or macro catalyst content present on the page
Topic assigned (macro catalysts) does not match actual content which is purely administrative
No economic data, policy decisions, or market-sensitive information contained herein

notes: Source is a government administrative listing page that catalogs historical MOAs and policy statements. Contains no current market-relevant information, economic data, or policy decisions. Not suitable for market structure or macro catalyst research.
